January 18, 1977 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
Post Office Box 807 
Sacramento, Ca. 95804 
Gentlemen: 
It is my understanding that for Councilmen the proper 
distribution of Form 470 and Form 430 is for the 
Councilmen to file an original and one copy with the 
City Clerk and that no copies are to be forwarded 
either to you or to the County Clerk. 
Please let me know if my understanding is incorrect. 
RLW:dm 
Very truly yours, 
Williams 
City Manager

sections.question: It is my understanding that for Councilmen the proper distribution of Form 470 and Form 430 is for the Councilmen to file an original and one copy with the City Clerk and that no copies are to be forwarded either to you or to the County Clerk. Please let me know if my understanding is incorrect.
sections.question_synthetic: The sender seeks confirmation regarding the proper filing procedures for Forms 470 and 430 by city councilmen, specifically whether originals and copies should be filed only with the City Clerk with no distribution to the FPPC or County Clerk.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter to the FPPC, not an FPPC response. No conclusion or advice from FPPC is present in this document. The document is partially illegible at the top but the main question is clear. Document ID format suggests 1977 vintage.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: It is my understanding that for Councilmen the proper distribution of Form 470 and Form 430 is for the Councilmen to file an original and one copy with the City Clerk and that no copies are to be forwarded either to you or to the County Clerk. Please let me know if my understanding is incorrect.
